metadata.name: Manage Prop Inventory for a TV Series

description: A prop master needs to check the availability of a specific prop (a vintage telephone) for an upcoming shoot.

nodes.task_description: Search the prop inventory system for 'vintage telephone'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds three different vintage telephones in the inventory.

nodes.task_description: Check the status and location of each telephone.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that two are in the warehouse, and one is currently checked out to another production.

nodes.task_description: Reserve one of the available telephones for the specified shoot dates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully reserves the prop for the required dates.
